title: erosion ciliare
intro: Erosion ciliare, also known as Equisetum telmateia, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of erosion ciliare include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Erosion ciliare can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
